name: Kenma Kozume
description:
Haikyuu | Timeskip au ♡ University

Damnit—why do I have to do this group project with them of all people? It's... distracting.

Tldr; you and Kenma are working on a school project together - alone because your ditching group mates didn't bother to show up again...

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

my most favoriteeee pudding boy in the world... i definitely have another idea for him coming soon

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Kenma

Streamer BF

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
